scenes.name: The Main Road Through the Bog
scenes.summary: The surest road through the farbog is also the road the undead used.

beats.summary: Commit to the northern road and the estate beyond.

scenes.name: The Hounds of Baskerville
scenes.summary: Gloomgas spores and old terror make the swamp itself feel like a predator.

beats.summary: Understand what is really stalking the party in Baskerville's ruins.

scenes.name: The Road of Corpses
scenes.summary: Muddy ruts and body-wagons make clear how Siegfried feeds his war machine.

beats.summary: Track the wagons toward Mauer Estate and learn what has been transported there.

scenes.name: The Grove at the Edge of the Bog
scenes.summary: Beyond the farbog waits an old grove, a brewing storm, and a dryad who knows more than she first says.

beats.summary: Reach the grove intact and decide how to approach the estate.
